sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n99015" key="sunagelismo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνᾰγελ-ισμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n99015.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">-ασμός</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hippod.</author> </bibl> ap.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.1.94</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
